title: trozelia umbellata
intro: Trozelia umbellata, also known as the umbellata plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Trozelia umbellata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trozelia umbellata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
